use_cases: Display user profile pictures in comment sections
Show artist avatars in music player interfaces
Represent users in social feeds and discussion threads
Provide fallback initials when images fail to load
Create consistent avatar styling across application
ai_summary: A reusable Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with AvatarImage and AvatarFallback sub-components. Features rounded-full styling, responsive sizing (10x10 units), and fallback to secondary background color with centered text. Intended for displaying user or artist profile pictures in music player interfaces but works as a general-purpose avatar primitive for any application requiring consistent user representation.
